name: Run for the Roses Pie
recipeIngredient: 1/3 cup milk chocolate or semisweet chocolate chips
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
2. In a large, heavy saucepan, combine brown sugar, corn syrup, molasses, butter, bourbon, vanilla extract, and salt. Heat to boiling, stirring frequently. Boil for 1 minute, stirring constantly. Remove pan from heat and let mixture cool.
3. In a bowl, beat eggs with half-and-half until well-blended. Mix eggs into cooled syrup mixture until well-incorporated. Stir in walnuts and chocolate chips. Pour the filling into pie crust.
4. Bake 45-50 minutes, until a toothpick inserted into center comes out clean. Serve warm or at room temperature. Accompany with ice cream if desired.
